text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm summoned by Director Akikawa.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: 's performance has been the definition of striking! And heartening!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done! Your incredible efforts have set a
benchmark for other Umamusume to aspire to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive words of praise! It sounds like we've
achieved a great result!
